Inputs:
S-strobe
$Q_{M-1}\dots Q_{0}-\text{adresses (line)}$
$I_{2^{M}-1}\dots I_{0}-\text{data lines (information lines)}$
Minter is a product of all adress lines
$$
\boxed{
\begin{align}
 & Y=\sum_{n=0}^{2^{M}-1}S·I_{M}·M_{N} \\
 & M_{N}=M_{N}(Q_{M-1}\dots Q_{0})
\end{align}
}
$$


Example
$4-to-1\text{ MUX}$

$m_{n}=m_{n}=(Q_{1},Q_{0})$
$Y=S·I_{0}·m_{0}+sI_{1}·m_{1}+sI_{2}·m_{2}+sI_{3}m_{3}=$
$=sI_{0}\bar{Q_{1}}\bar{Q_{0}}+sI_{1}\bar{Q_{1}}\bar{Q_{0}}+sI_{2}\bar{Q_{1}}\bar{Q_{0}}+sI_{3}\bar{Q_{1}}\bar{Q_{0}}$

---

# Design with Multiplexers(MUX)
$F(\overbrace{ X_{N-1},\dots,X_{M} }^{ N-M \text{ additional inputs} },\overbrace{ X_{M-1},\dots,X_{0} }^{ M\text{ basic inputs} })=^{M\text{ times T10a}}_{\text{with respect to basic inputs}}$

$\overbrace{ F(X_{N-1},\dots,X_{M},0,\dots,0) }^{ D_{0} }·\overbrace{ \bar{X}_{M-1}· \dots · \bar{X}_{0} }^{ M_{N}(X_{M-1},\dots,X_{0}) }+$
$\overbrace{ F(X_{N-1},\dots,X_{M},0,\dots,1) }^{ D_{1} }X_{M-1}·\dots· \bar{X}_{0}+\dots+$
$+F(X_{N-1},\dots,X_{M},1,\dots,0)X_{M-1}·\dots· \bar{X}_{0}+$
$+\underbrace{ F(X_{N-1},\dots,X_{M,1,\dots,1}) }_{ D_{2^{M-1}} }X_{M-1}·\dots·X_{0}$
$=D_{0}m_{0}+D_{1}m_{1}+\dots+D_{2^{m-1}}$
